Requirement 2 — All Collections (Scope Expanded)

Product Priority Guidance — All Products, All Collections

Requested by: Dilaksi (SEO team) · Store: ledsone.co.uk · Generated: 2026-07-07 · Scope: All Collections (475) · Date range: Last 30 Days
Scope changed: 5 collections → ALL 475 collections 5,179 products · 17,542 SKU/variant rows Sales are net of returns Demand: Semrush UK monthly search volume Organic Sessions: GA4 Data API, last 30 days, Organic Search only Profit Margin: N/A — COGS not in PostgreSQL (not required by any reachable rule)

Sales: SEO Priority:
How to read each product row (hover any badge for the full explanation):
Demand: 6,600 searches/mo “pendant lights” = UK monthly Google searches for the keyword mapped to this product (Semrush). Grey Demand: 0 searches/mo = mapped keyword has no measurable volume; "n/a" = no keyword could be derived.
Organic: 31 visits (30d) = visitors landing on this product page from unpaid Google search in the last 30 days (GA4 Data API, Organic Search only).
£1,995.12 = net sales, last 30 days · 49 units = units sold.
SEO: High / SEO: Medium / SEO: Low / SEO: Low — flag for review = SEO Priority from the approved 6-condition business rule (hover for matched condition + inputs).
Each product row shows every Shopify collection it belongs to (grey pills) — use the collection dropdown to filter to one collection at a time. Results are paginated (100 per page) for a fast, responsive page.
SEO Priority calculated using the approved Dilaksi Requirement 2 business rule (6 conditions, exact order). (1) Demand<100 AND Sales<£2,000 → Low—flag · (2) Sales≥£10,000 AND Margin≥30% → High · (3) Demand≥2,000 AND Organic<50% of Demand → High · (4) Sales≥£4,000 AND Margin≥25% AND Demand≥500 → Medium · (5) Demand≥500 AND Organic≥50% of Demand → Medium · (6) else Low. Profit Margin is not available (COGS not yet in PostgreSQL) but is never required across the full catalog: the highest 30-day product sales is £1,705.42, below both the £4,000 and £10,000 thresholds in rules 2 and 4 — so those rules cannot match any of the 5,179 rows. Nothing invented; documented in AIOS evidence.
Scope change: this page replaces the previous 5-collection scope (Pendant Lights, Wall Lights, Spider Lights, Plug-in Lighting, Table Lamps) with all 475 Shopify collections on ledsone.co.uk, covering all 5,179 unique products in the catalog (previously 1,231). Products belonging to multiple collections are shown once, with every collection they belong to listed as a pill under the title (use the dropdown to filter to one).
Data sources: Shopify Admin GraphQL Bulk Operations API (all products, variants, SKUs, collection membership — full catalog export, 17,542 variants) + ShopifyQL sales cube (net sales/units/orders, last 30 days, 1,705 variant rows with nonzero activity; remaining variants verified zero) + Semrush keyword_research (`phrase_these`, UK database, 1,091 unique keywords across old+new batches) + GA4 Data API (property 408110563, Organic Search channel only, true last 30 days, all landing pages).
SEO Priority is calculated from the approved Requirement 2 business rule (see red-bordered rule box above); per-row calculation log saved in AIOS evidence (`2026-07-07_req2-allcol-seo-priority-log.csv`).
Performance: this page renders 5,179 products client-side in pages of 100 (instead of all at once) for a fast, responsive experience — filtering runs over an in-memory dataset, not the DOM.
